hero.title: Ceramics for every table and ritual.
hero.image_alt: Handmade ceramic objects styled in neutral tones

feature.image_alt: Ceramic pieces in process on a studio table
feature.title: Made to be held.
feature.description: Every Waterlight piece is hand-thrown, kiln-fired, and finished in small batches.

items.title: Pure Materials
items.description: Stoneware clay bodies and mineral glazes selected for daily use and longevity.

items.title: Small Batch
items.description: Limited drops let each collection stay intentional, tactile, and carefully finished.

items.title: Made by Hand
items.description: No two forms are identical. Natural variation is treated as part of the signature.

journal.intro_text: It all begins with an idea. Maybe you want a collection for your table. Maybe you want heirloom pieces that feel grounded and personal.

about.hero_title: A tactile, calm approach to commercial storytelling.
about.hero_description: Waterlight Studio blends documentary pacing with editorial refinement. We design image systems that feel lived-in, not overproduced.
about.origin_text_1: The studio began as a response to fast visual trends. Instead of high-gloss sameness, we work with weathered surfaces, coastal movement, and directional natural light to give each set an honest atmosphere.
about.origin_text_2: This launch build intentionally uses placeholder narrative copy. Final story details can replace these sections without changing the approved layout.

principles.title: Material honesty
principles.description: Let linen, stone, skin texture, and grain remain visible instead of over-smoothing.

principles.title: Directional light
principles.description: Build depth with natural and practical lighting before adding post-production contrast.

principles.title: Human pacing
principles.description: Frame people in motion and pause to preserve natural gesture instead of static posing.

engagement.title: Editorial Day Session
engagement.description: Ideal for founder portraits, homepage narrative moments, and launch campaign assets.

engagement.title: Brand Narrative Package
engagement.description: Multi-location coverage and expanded library for website, social, and seasonal releases.

gallery.hero_title: Gallery rhythms in the same calm, earthy direction.
gallery.hero_description: Placeholder image blocks are organized by mood and context so final photography can be inserted quickly once selections are approved.
